name: io.github.smythmyke/patent-search-mcp-server
description: Patent search, dossiers, OA analysis, citations, family, CPC lookup via Google Patents + USPTO.

environmentVariables.name: PATENT_SEARCH_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key minted from the AI Patent Search Generator Chrome extension's Admin tab. Format: psg_live_... or psg_test_...

environmentVariables.name: PATENT_SEARCH_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Default: https://us-central1-solicitation-matcher-extension.cloudfunctions.net/ai/v1
